name: Tea
specimenCopy: The same plant makes green tea and black tea both. The difference is entirely in what happens after picking. One leaf was allowed to oxidize until it darkened. The other was stopped first.
offeringCopy: You've been at 2,600 metres. The tea was too.

sensoryProfile.aroma: Damp malt, forest honey, eucalyptus tree bark
sensoryProfile.flavor: Rich copper body, mild astringency, sweet honey finish
sensoryProfile.appearance: Long, dark twisted black tea leaves
